allow: Bash(psql -U postgres -c "CREATE USER sparky WITH PASSWORD 'sparky_pass';")
Bash(psql -U postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE sparky_db OWNER sparky;")
Bash(psql -U postgres -c "GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON DATABASE sparky_db TO sparky;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="sparky_pass" psql -U sparky -d sparky_db -h localhost -c "SELECT 1 AS ok;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="sparky2026" psql -U sparky -d sparky_db -h localhost -c "SELECT 'connexion OK' AS statut;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="sparky2026" psql -U sparky -d sparky_db -h localhost -c "SELECT 'test insert' AS ok;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD="sparky2026" psql -U sparky -d sparky_db -h localhost -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM documents;")
Bash(psql -U sparky -d sparky_db -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS nb_documents FROM documents;")
Bash(psql -U sparky -d sparky_db -h localhost -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM documents;")
Bash(psql -U sparky -d sparky_db -h 127.0.0.1 -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM documents;")
Bash(psql -U sparky -d sparky_db -h 127.0.0.1 -c "SELECT id, nom_fichier, type_document FROM documents;")
